Video.summary: Martha and her friends make three pasta dishes, perfect for dinner or a dinner party.
Video.title: Pasta Night

Video.summary: Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty French one-pot meal of meat and vegetables.
Video.title: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Image.alt: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Video.summary: Martha makes homemade soup: chicken soup, minestrone, spinach cream soup.
Video.title: Soups

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates egg recipes; Martha visits her chicken coop.
Video.title: How to Properly Cook an Egg

Image.alt: How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg

Video.summary: Martha and her friend Monica create a Vietnamese feast.
Video.title: Vietnamese Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha makes her favorite jam recipes.
Video.title: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Image.alt: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha takes shellfish to the next level.
Video.title: Shellfish

Video.summary: Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.
Video.title: Perfect Chicken Dinner

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha serves up delicious homemade pizzas alongside friends and pizza chefs Christian Petroni and Dean Medico; featuring classic pizzas, signature sauces, and more.
Video.title: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Image.alt: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Video.summary: Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.
Video.title: Brunch Favorites

Video.summary: Martha poaches: chicken breasts (chicken salad, sandwich), salmon, eggs (cobb salad).
Video.title: Poaching

Video.summary: Martha makes the perfect roast: prime rib, crown roast of pork, stuffed turkey breast.
Video.title: Perfect Roast

Video.summary: Martha prepares vegetables: crudite, artichokes, vegetable tian, roasted pepper salad.
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha prepares a brunch menu with whitefish salad from Acme Smoked Fish Corp and crafts a cocktail featuring two brunch staples; Martha makes her favorite frittata dish and bakes a rhubarb crisp.
Video.title: Martha's Favorite Brunch

Video.summary: Martha shares techniques for baking sweet and savory pies.
Video.title: Embellished Pies

Video.summary: Martha makes steak dinners cooked to perfection.
Video.title: Steak Night

Video.summary: Martha fries: French fries, waffle chips, buttermilk chicken, tempura vegetables.
Video.title: Frying

Video.summary: Martha pan-sears: scallops, salmon fillets, steak with mustard-cream sauce, duck breasts.
Video.title: Pan Searing

Video.summary: Martha makes hearty stews: beef stew, coq au vin, veal stew with artichoke hearts.
Video.title: Stewing

Video.summary: Martha makes homemade pasta with guest chef and pasta specialist Michael White.
Video.title: Pasta

Video.summary: Martha makes pasta sauces: bolognese, puttanesca, carbonara, bucatini with bottarga.
Video.title: Pasta Sauce

Video.summary: Martha invites chef Dave Pasternack to discuss buying, cleaning, and filleting fish.
Video.title: Fishmonger

Video.summary: Martha sautes Wiener schnitzel, chicken piccata, sole a la meuniere, calf's liver.
Video.title: Sauteing

Video.summary: Republique restaurant Chef Margarita Lorenzana-Manzke joins Martha to prepare recipes.
Video.title: Brioche, Tarts and Pie

Video.summary: Martha and Chef Kenji Lopez-Alt make the perfect fried-chicken.
Video.title: The Science of Woks and Frying

Image.alt: The Science of Woks and Frying
The Science of Woks and Frying
The Science of Woks and Frying

Video.summary: Martha invites Oscar de la Renta co-creative director Laura Kim to her kitchen.
Video.title: Perfect Weekend Breakfast

Video.summary: Learn as Martha transforms one cake recipe into three dazzling frosted cakes.
Video.title: Frosted Cakes

Video.summary: Martha shows how cultured dairy products can enhance your baked goods.
Video.title: Cultured Dairy

Video.summary: Martha presents how to add lemon into three delicious recipes.
Video.title: Lemons

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates how to incorporate ginger into your baking.
Video.title: Ginger

Video.summary: Chocolate Souffle, Laminated Phone List Good Thing, Greenwich Orchids
Video.title: Chocolate Souffles, Greenwich Orchids

Video.summary: Decorating a Cake with Buttercream, Pastry Bag Icing Tips, Ivy Tips Good Thing, Shoe Care Kit Good Thing
Video.title: Spring Garden Cake, Ivy Tips, Shoe Care

Image.alt: Spring Garden Cake, Ivy Tips, Shoe Care
Spring Garden Cake, Ivy Tips, Shoe Care
Spring Garden Cake, Ivy Tips, Shoe Care

Video.summary: Spring Gardening: Clivia, Spring Cleaning the Garden, Building a Cold Frame
Video.title: Spring Gardening: Clivia, Cold Frame

Video.summary: Topiaries, Clematis Good Thing, Staking Good Thing
Video.title: Topiaries, Clematis, Staking GT

Video.summary: Pegging and Pruning Roses, Living Wreaths, Garden Stakes, Manure Tea
Video.title: Pegging and Pruning Roses, Manure Tea

Image.alt: Pegging and Pruning Roses, Manure Tea
Pegging and Pruning Roses, Manure Tea
Pegging and Pruning Roses, Manure Tea

Video.summary: Mesclun Salad, Crab Boil, Spray Paint for Outdoor Furniture, Cutting Garden, Strawberry Lemonade Good Thing
Video.title: Crab Boil, Strawberry Lemonade
